Files.Pick: Select one or more spell .json files
Files.PickHint: Hold Ctrl (Windows) or Cmd (macOS) to select multiple files.

Folder.PathHint: Foundry Data path, e.g. modules/my-spells/data — every .json found will be parsed.

Paste.Hint: Paste a single spell JSON object, or a JSON array of spell objects.

Preview.Heading: Found {count} spell(s) ready to import
Preview.Skipped: Skipped {count} entries that did not look like spells

Options.OnDuplicate: If a spell with the same name already exists

Notifications.NotASpell: {name} is not a spell (type was "{type}") — skipped.
Notifications.PackMissing: Compendium pack not found. Make sure the module is enabled.
Notifications.PermissionDenied: Only the GM can import into the compendium.
